zh.lifeSummary: 當Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale於大約1190年出生在義大利薩德尼亞時，她的父親Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres64歲，母親Spella33歲。她於1210年與Emmanuele DORIA結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1260年在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年72歲。

zh-hans.Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy: 意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾
zh-hans.Genova, Liguria, Italia: 意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale于大约1190年出生在意大利薩德尼亞时，她的父亲Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres64岁，母亲Spella33岁。她于1210年与Emmanuele DORIA结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1260年在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Iurgia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Cecilio, Chiara, Marco, Silvano.  Spanish Cruz, Jose, Beatriz, Guadalupe, Paola, Ramon.
Italian (Sardinia): nickname from Sardinian murgia ‘brine’ or murcia ‘marc (of olives), dregs’ (compare Morga ).
Basque: habitational name from either of the two towns called Murgia, in Araba/Álava and Gipuzkoa provinces, Basque Country (Spain). Compare   Murguia  .

variants.name: Morga
meanings: Pet form of Mór, now also used as an independent given name.

variants.name: Murguia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Eduardo, Francisco, Salvador, Carlos, Manuel, Jose Luis, Juana, Luis, Raul, Alberto.

variants.name: Morgillo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmela, Pietro, Salvatore, Vincenza.
Italian: diminutive of Morgia, a variant of Murgia .

nameMeanings.name: 'Giorgia'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   George .  It was borne by a 5th-century saint who became a recluse near Clermont in the Auvergne and, more recently, by the celebrated American artist  Georgia O'Keeffe  (  1887–1986 ). It has been very popular since the mid-1990s.

variants.name: Jorja
meanings: Respelling of   Georgia  , which is popular in New Zealand.

en.lifeSummary: When Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale was born about 1190, in Sardinia, Italy, her father, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, was 64 and her mother, Spella, was 33. She married Emmanuele DORIA in 1210. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1260, in Genoa, Genova, Liguria, Italy, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale est née environ 1190, à Sardegna, Italie, son père, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Spella, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Emmanuele DORIA en 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1260, à Genès, Genova, Liguria, Italie, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale um 1190 in Sardinien, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres 64 und ihre Mutter Spella 33. Sie hat 1210 Emmanuele DORIA geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1260 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Genua, Genova, Liguria, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale è nata il circa 1190 nel Sardegna, Italia, sua padre, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Spella, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Emmanuele DORIA nel 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1260, nel Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy: イタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノ
ja.Genova, Liguria, Italia: イタリアリグリアジェノヴァジェノヴァ
ja.lifeSummary: Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunaleが約1190年にイタリアサルデグナで生まれた時，父Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torresは64歳，母Spellaは33歳であった。1210年にEmmanuele DORIAと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1260年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァジェノヴァで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale(이)가 대략 1190년 이탈리아 사르데그나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Spella(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1210년 Emmanuele DORIA(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 노바에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1190–about 1260: tany ho any amin'ny 1190–tany ho any amin'ny 1260

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Sardegna, Itália, seu pai, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Spella, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Emmanuele DORIA em 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1260, em Genova, Genova, Liguria, Itália, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale родилась около 1190 г. в местности сардегна, Италия, её отцу по имени Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Spella, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Emmanuele DORIA в 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1260 г. в местности дженова, дженова, лигуря, Италия в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.about 1190–about 1260: e tusa o le 1190–e tusa o le 1260

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale nació aproximadamente 1190, en Sardegna, Italia, su papá, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Spella, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Emmanuele DORIA en 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1260, en Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, a la edad de 72 años.
